expectations.text: DDD contains actual hex color codes (#XXXXXX format)
DDD names specific font families, not generic 'sans-serif'
expectations.evidence: DDD specifies Space Grotesk (display), DM Sans (body), and JetBrains Mono (code snippets) — all specific named fonts

expectations.text: DDD has specific pixel values for spacing and font sizes
expectations.evidence: Font sizes: 64px, 44px, 24px, 20px, 18px, 16px, 14px, 12px, 48px. Spacing: 128px section padding, 64px internal gap, 32px card padding, 24px card gap, 16px element gap, 64px nav height

expectations.text: DDD specifies at most 2 font families
expectations.evidence: DDD specifies 3 font families: Space Grotesk (display), DM Sans (body), and JetBrains Mono (monospace/code). While JetBrains Mono is used minimally for terminal accents, the assertion says 'at most 2'.

expectations.text: All spacing values in DDD are multiples of 8
expectations.evidence: Most values are on 8px grid (128px, 64px, 32px, 24px, 16px), but button padding is '14px 28px' — 14px and 28px are not multiples of 8. Also '10px 20px' for nav CTA, 6px 12px for badge padding — 6px, 10px, 14px, 28px are off-grid.

expectations.text: Build plan contains forge CLI commands
expectations.evidence: Build plan uses forge connect, forge create-project, forge insert frame, forge style, forge insert text, forge set-text, forge insert stack, forge set-layout, forge screenshot, forge publish throughout

expectations.text: Build plan includes forge screenshot after sections
expectations.evidence: Screenshots after each section: step-1-nav.png, step-2-hero.png, step-3-logos.png, step-4-features.png, step-5-pricing.png, step-6-footer.png, full-page-qa.png

expectations.text: Build plan covers all 5 requested sections: hero, features grid, social proof, pricing, footer
expectations.evidence: Build plan includes: Step 2 Hero, Step 4 Features Grid (3 columns, 6 cards), Step 3 Social Proof/Logo Bar, Step 5 Pricing Table (3 tiers), Step 6 Footer. All 5 requested sections present.
